headline: Hormel Foods Corporation Announces Second Quarter Earnings Call
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, invites interested parties to participate in a webcast and conference call with Jeff Ettinger, interim chief executive officer; John Ghingo, president; and Paul Kuehneman, interim chief financial officer and controller, to discuss the Company's second quarter financial results. The Company will issue its earnings release before the markets open on Thursday, May 28, 2026, and will host a conference call at 8 a.m. CT

content.title: Hormel Foods Corporation Announces Second Quarter Earnings Call
content.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, invites interested parties to participate in a webcast and conference call with Jeff Ettinger, interim chief executive officer; John Ghingo, president; and Paul Kuehneman, interim chief financial officer and controller, to discuss the Company's second quarter financial results. The Company will issue its earnings release before the markets open on Thursday, May 28, 2026, and will host a conference call at 8 a.m. CT

thumbnail.caption: Hormel Foods Corporation, based in Austin, Minnesota, is a global branded food company with approximately $12 billion in annual revenue across more than 80 countries worldwide. (PRNewsfoto/Hormel Foods Corporation)
